title: Argentinian Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with the flavors of Argentina, featuring creamy stracciatella cheese and argentinian ground beef.
instructions: Cook the casserole according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Stir in the salt, black pepper, and cooked casserole.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with the stracciatella and cheddar cheese.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
